$schema: Registry of all available skills in this project.

skills.name: web-api-integrated
skills.description: Integrate API endpoints into the frontend with Zod schemas, response types, constants, and react-query hooks. Use when implementing endpoints from an API contract, Postman, or Swagger.
skills.whenToUse: Integrate API endpoint to frontend with schema, types, constants, and hooks

skills.name: web-bugfix
skills.description: Fix frontend bugs with minimum-touch changes, keep other surfaces stable, and sync schema, types, hooks, constants, tests, and related docs when impacted.
skills.whenToUse: Fix frontend bug with minimal touch and sync impacted contracts

skills.name: web-code-review
skills.description: Review frontend code with a firm senior-lead standard, focusing on bugs, regressions, architecture risks, and test gaps in apps/web and the shared contracts the frontend depends on.
skills.whenToUse: Review frontend code strictly before merge or during quality audit

skills.name: web-seo-geo-friendly
skills.description: Optimize public Next.js App Router pages for SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). Use when the user explicitly requests SEO/GEO optimization on public pages.
skills.whenToUse: SEO and GEO optimization for public Next.js pages

skills.name: web-slicing
skills.description: Convert screenshot/Figma designs into pixel-perfect frontend UI with reusable components. Use when the task focuses on visual and layout implementation.
skills.whenToUse: Implement UI from design, screenshot, or Figma

skills.name: api-bugfix
skills.description: Fix backend bugs with minimal touch, keep other layers stable, then sync validator, DTO, OpenAPI, shared schema/types, tests, and related docs when behavior is affected.
skills.whenToUse: Fix backend bug with minimal touch and sync impacted contracts

skills.name: api-code-review
skills.description: Review backend code with a senior lead standard, focused on bugs, regressions, contract drift, clean architecture risks, and test gaps in apps/api and related shared contracts.
skills.whenToUse: Review backend code strictly before merge or during quality audit

skills.name: api-feature
skills.description: Implement new backend features following Clean Architecture. Use for tasks involving new endpoints, use cases, entities, repositories, or application-layer changes.
skills.whenToUse: Implement new backend feature following Clean Architecture

skills.name: db-prisma-schema
skills.description: Write or modify apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma and execute safe PostgreSQL migrations. Use for database model, relation, index, enum changes, or schema-to-domain-layer sync.
skills.whenToUse: Changes to schema.prisma and PostgreSQL migration validation

skills.name: docs-openapi
skills.description: Write or update OpenAPI documentation in split-per-feature format under `docs/openapi`. Use when endpoints, request/response schemas, or API contracts change.
skills.whenToUse: Write or update split OpenAPI documentation per feature

skills.name: ops-docker
skills.description: Write or modify Dockerfiles for this backend so it is ready to deploy on Linux. Use for tasks involving containerization, image optimization, or build/runtime issues in containers. Docker Compose is managed by the server — do not touch it.
skills.whenToUse: Write or modify backend Dockerfile for Linux deployment

skills.name: ops-mcp-setup
skills.description: Configure the GitHub MCP server in this project so the agent can interact with the repository. Use on first-time project setup or when MCP is not yet connected.
skills.whenToUse: Setup GitHub MCP for this repo's workflow

skills.name: flow-session-start
skills.description: Handle Start or Mulai commands for repo onboarding: check MCP, registry, memory, and work status then direct user to the appropriate next step.
skills.whenToUse: Handle Start/Mulai command for repo onboarding

skills.name: meta-skill-hygiene
skills.description: Audit, sync, and maintain skill metadata consistency across this repo. Use when skills, the registry, Claude wrappers, or agent metadata change.
skills.whenToUse: Audit and maintain skill metadata consistency

skills.name: skill-add-example
skills.description: Add real code examples to .agents/examples/ so other skills can reference them. Use when a new pattern needs to be standardized as a template or agent reference.
skills.whenToUse: Add reusable example code for other skills

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create a new skill from scratch with full structure — SKILL.md, references, templates, openai.yaml, Claude wrapper, and registration in manifest + AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md.
skills.whenToUse: Create or update skills with consistent format

skills.name: openspec-apply-change
skills.description: Implement tasks from an OpenSpec change. Use when the user wants to start implementing, continue implementation, or work through tasks.
skills.whenToUse: Implement tasks from an active OpenSpec change

skills.name: openspec-archive-change
skills.description: Archive a completed change in the experimental workflow. Use when the user wants to finalize and archive a change after implementation is complete.
skills.whenToUse: Archive a completed OpenSpec change

skills.name: openspec-explore
skills.description: Enter explore mode - a thinking partner for exploring ideas, investigating problems, and clarifying requirements. Use when the user wants to think through something before or during a change.
skills.whenToUse: Explore and think through ideas before committing to a change

skills.name: openspec-propose
skills.description: Propose a new change with all artifacts generated in one step. Use when the user wants to quickly describe what they want to build and get a complete proposal with design, specs, and tasks ready for implementation.
skills.whenToUse: Start a new feature — turn an idea into proposal + specs + design + tasks

skills.name: openspec-sync-specs
skills.description: Sync delta specs from a change to main specs. Use when the user wants to update main specs with changes from a delta spec, without archiving the change.
skills.whenToUse: Sync delta specs to main specs
